content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 — Demo credentials look real, but notes.txt is "n/a" and does not explain how to reach the subscription paywall / app-blocking core features (`fastlane/metadata/review_information/notes.txt:1`, gated by `LoginView.swift` SecureField + `PaywallView.swift`)
Pierre: Apple's reviewers need actionable steps to reach paywalled or gated functionality, and a login-gated app whose core features (app blocking, schedules, reports) sit behind a subscription will likely be rejected if they can't get past the wall. The demo user/password are valid-looking, but "n/a" notes give no guidance on how to trigger the paywall or exercise Screen Time blocking. Replace notes.txt with concrete steps: how to log in, how to reach PaywallView, and how reviewers can test the subscription (e.g., sandbox account or comped access).
